meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
content.seo_description: Learn how to build SaaS pricing models to overcome no portfolio. An intermediate-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first real-world project.
content.answer_block: Building a dynamic SaaS pricing engine is the ultimate portfolio differentiator. By architecting a tiered subscription system, you demonstrate mastery over database relations, Stripe API integration, and edge-case error handling. This project moves you from a passive learner to a deployable engineer, proving you can ship production-ready revenue infrastructure.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub contribution graph, the silence of an empty portfolio echoing louder than any rejection email. The industry doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about your ability to bridge the gap between abstract code and tangible business value. You are currently viewed as a student, but that is a temporary state, not an identity.

The secret to breaking through is building a system that solves a 'real' problem. A SaaS pricing engine isn't just a UI component; it is the heartbeat of every profitable company. By building one, you prove you understand the logic behind conversions, user tiers, and secure transaction handling. This is your ticket to being taken seriously.

steps.title: Define the Tiered Architecture
steps.description: Establish the data model for Basic, Pro, and Enterprise tiers. You need to map features to database flags to ensure dynamic access control.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS pricing model with three tiers. Include fields for monthly/yearly billing, feature limits, and Stripe integration IDs.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing API
steps.description: Connect your backend to Stripe to handle checkout sessions. This proves you can handle sensitive third-party integrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Node.js service to create Stripe checkout sessions based on the selected pricing tier, including webhooks for event handling.

steps.title: Implement Middleware Access Control
steps.description: Create a robust middleware that checks user subscription status before serving API responses, preventing unauthorized access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Express.js middleware that verifies user subscription status against the database before allowing access to protected API routes.

steps.title: Design the Pricing Page UI
steps.description: Build a high-conversion pricing component using Tailwind CSS. Focus on visual hierarchy and call-to-action placement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive pricing table component in React/Tailwind with a toggle for monthly vs yearly billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate component PricingTable --framework react --style tailwind

steps.title: Deploy with Monitoring
steps.description: Deploy your app and add basic logging to track pricing events, simulating real-world dev-ops workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration for Vercel and add Winston logging for tracking Stripe webhook events.

pro_tips: Always implement a 'grace period' logic in your database to handle payment failures without immediately locking users out.
Use feature flags instead of hard-coding tier logic; it makes your app infinitely more scalable for future pricing changes.
Never store raw pricing in the frontend; always validate the price ID against your backend database to prevent price tampering.
Mock your Stripe webhooks locally using the Stripe CLI during development to simulate edge cases like failed renewals.
Include a 'Cancel' flow in your demo; showing you can handle churn gracefully is a senior-level detail that impresses recruiters.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, add a 'User Dashboard' that shows current plan usage metrics. This turns a pricing page into a full SaaS ecosystem.
content.conversion_block: Stop building tutorials and start building products that matter. You have the tools, the roadmap, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
